response.global_analysis: 1. Transcription & Translation: Manually transcribed and translated English dialogue spoken by the VTuber (Ina) and other players (FuwaMoco and Anya) in Minecraft. 2. Reference JSON: Fully ignored as there are no lyrics present and it is continuous gameplay. 3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly aligned to vocal audio cues with instantaneous transitions where appropriate to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: I don't think they sell melon, no?
subtitles.english: I don't think they sell melon, no?

subtitles.original: Uh! Farm Money Boost! Yes! Yes, yes, yes.
subtitles.english: Uh! Farm Money Boost! Yes! Yes, yes, yes.

subtitles.original: How much honey should I buy? Like 20? 40?
subtitles.english: How much honey should I buy? Like 20? 40?

subtitles.original: But the boss... the boss is pretty easy.
subtitles.english: But the boss... the boss is pretty easy.

subtitles.original: Okay, like, yeah, we have the shoes now.
subtitles.english: Okay, like, yeah, we have the shoes now.

subtitles.original: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah! You guys are so strong!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah! You guys are so strong!

subtitles.original: Look at you! Look at you with your diamond... with your diamond shoes!
subtitles.english: Look at you! Look at you with your diamond... with your diamond shoes!

subtitles.original: Ina, have you went to the dungeons or Nazotoki?
subtitles.english: Ina, have you went to the dungeons or Nazotoki?

subtitles.original: Oh... Oh, what you're doing today?
subtitles.english: Oh... Oh, what you're doing today?

subtitles.original: Maybe, maybe you can spare a few bees?
subtitles.english: Maybe, maybe you can spare a few bees?

subtitles.original: Um, not on me, though, unfortunately.
subtitles.english: Um, not on me, though, unfortunately.

subtitles.original: Oh! You don't have any bees on you right now?
subtitles.english: Oh! You don't have any bees on you right now?

subtitles.original: Wait, how do you sell stuff?
subtitles.english: Wait, how do you sell stuff?

subtitles.original: I have this, though. It's Koronesuki, right?
subtitles.english: I have this, though. It's Koronesuki, right?

subtitles.original: Whoa! Yellow also looks like... wait, you have that?
subtitles.english: Whoa! Yellow also looks like... wait, you have that?

subtitles.original: Wait, you too? You too, Mococo?
subtitles.english: Wait, you too? You too, Mococo?

subtitles.original: Oh! How? How did you get it?
subtitles.english: Oh! How? How did you get it?

subtitles.original: You can get rid of the Koronesuki?
subtitles.english: You can get rid of the Koronesuki?

subtitles.original: I can also sell my Koronesuki for 1,000,000,000 Yen!
subtitles.english: I can also sell my Koronesuki for 1,000,000,000 Yen!

subtitles.original: Wait, did you guys get a Takodachi?
subtitles.english: Wait, did you guys get a Takodachi?

subtitles.original: Oh... Can you sell the Koronesuki for it?
subtitles.english: Oh... Can you sell the Koronesuki for it?

subtitles.original: I didn't... I didn't get it.
subtitles.english: I didn't... I didn't get it.

subtitles.original: I got that from Santa for being a good kid.
subtitles.english: I got that from Santa for being a good kid.

subtitles.original: Oh, and you're gonna sell it away?
subtitles.english: Oh, and you're gonna sell it away?

subtitles.original: You're passing on the Christmas magic to us?
subtitles.english: You're passing on the Christmas magic to us?

subtitles.original: Ah, can we do it? Can we sell the Koronesuki?
subtitles.english: Ah, can we do it? Can we sell the Koronesuki?

subtitles.original: Don't sell it! That was a present!
subtitles.english: Don't sell it! That was a present!
